changelog:
v1.3.3 - Personal Butler & Setup Polish

- Programmer 400 error fix - AI role 'ai' mapped to 'assistant' for OpenAI API compatibility
- Restricted settings instructions - guided Android 13+ Allow restricted settings setup for accessibility
- Personal Butler mode - diamond toggle in ADE switches to butler persona with quick action buttons
- Butler quick actions - Set Alarm, Set Timer, Set Volume, Set Brightness, Toggle WiFi, Toggle Flashlight
- Natural language butler commands - 'wake me up at 7am', 'silence my phone', 'max volume', 'mute'
- Dialog pickers for alarm time, timer duration, and slider controls for volume/brightness
- NVIDIA LLM prompt enhanced with comprehensive action guide and natural language examples
- Voice command parser now handles 'wake me at', direct toggles, silent mode, max volume, remind me

v1.3.2 - Full Feature Release

- Programmer - interactive HTML/CSS/JS learning IDE with AI tutor
- Agent Driven Environment - device control & automation with scroll, go back, deep link
- General Chat rewrite - voice input, image gen, file attachments, NVIDIA vision
- Image save/share with Ambot AI branded watermark
- 50+ crash fixes from comprehensive codebase audit
